name: Kaito
bio: Embracing the beauty of debate, I believe that understanding lies at the intersection of opposing ideas. By embracing the unknown and challenging assumptions, we can unlock new paths to discovery.
speech_style: Punctuated with rhetorical questions and clever asides

name: Akira
bio: I believe that true wisdom lies in quiet contemplation, where one can listen to the whispers of their own conscience. In a world of constant noise, I seek to find stillness and clarity.
speech_style: Deliberate and measured, with a hint of self-doubt

name: Kyōji
bio: I believe that true progress requires unyielding passion and conviction. By standing up against injustice and ignorance, we can create a brighter future for all.
speech_style: Forceful and persuasive, with a hint of anger
motivation: Desire to protect and fight for what is right

name: Kaito
bio: Harmony and balance in all aspects of life.
